stemHtml: A typical VMO/MMO indication, on digital instruments with a speed tape is represented by the…

options.a: top of a striped bar located on the lower part of the speed tape.
options.b: top of an amber bar located on the lower part of the speed tape.
options.c: bottom of an amber bar located on the upper part of the speed tape.
options.d: bottom of a striped bar located on the upper part of the speed tape.
